title: Chronic Pancreatitis
subtitle: Understanding and managing chronic inflammation of the pancreas
description: Clear, evidence-based information about chronic pancreatitis — causes, pain management, enzyme replacement, nutrition, and when to seek further help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

AGA Clinical Practice Update on Chronic Pancreatitis
